description:
You are a FinOps analyst who has been asked to verify the cost of a single AWS EC2
  region during the first week of June 2023.  
  All the raw daily billing logs have already been copied for you to
  /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/ as text files named
  2023-06-01.log … 2023-06-07.log.  
  Every log line is a single comma-separated record that always follows the exact pattern

      YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ,SERVICE,REGION,COST

  For example  

      2023-06-02T13:00:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.150

  Your goals:

  1. Use a single regular-expression based filter that selects **only** the lines that  
     • belong to the SERVICE “EC2”,  
     • belong to the REGION “us-east-1”, and  
     • fall between (and including) the calendar dates 2023-06-01 and 2023-06-07.  

  2. Append every matching line, in its original form, to the new file  
     /home/user/cloud_costs/work/ec2_us-east-1_2023-06-01_to_2023-06-07.log  
     (create the directory /home/user/cloud_costs/work/ if it does not exist).
     The filtered log must contain **only** the matching lines, in their original order,
     with no extra blank lines or headers.

  3. Compute the total cost of those matching lines by summing the fourth column
     (a decimal value).  Save the result to  

     /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/ec2_us-east-1_summary_2023-06-01_to_2023-06-07.txt  

     in exactly the one-line format shown below (including the colon, dollar sign and
     two digits after the decimal point):

     Total EC2 us-east-1 cost for 2023-06-01 to 2023-06-07: $<TOTAL>

     Example of the required format when TOTAL is 1.23:

     Total EC2 us-east-1 cost for 2023-06-01 to 2023-06-07: $1.23

  4. Make sure both new files are world-readable (chmod 644) so that the automated
     grader can inspect them.

  Notes and constraints:

  • You must rely on a regular expression to perform the filtering step; do not move or
    delete the original raw log files.  
  • Do not change anything inside /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/.  
  • Do not add any extra commentary to the two output files; console output during
    your work is fine.  
  • The automated test will verify:
      – that the filtered file exists at the exact path given and contains the exact
        nine (9) matching lines in the correct order;  
      – that the summary file exists at the exact path given and contains exactly
        one line in the specified format, with the correct total cost rounded to two
        decimal places;  
      – that both files have 644 permissions.

  When everything looks correct, you are done.
truth:
<!--  PRE-EXISTING ENVIRONMENT  -->
  Directory /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/ already exists and contains seven log files:

  1. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-01.log
     2023-06-01T01:15:30Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.120
     2023-06-01T02:45:10Z,S3,us-east-1,0.005
     2023-06-01T03:30:00Z,EC2,us-west-2,0.200

  2. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-02.log
     2023-06-02T13:00:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.150
     2023-06-02T15:30:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.200
     2023-06-02T16:00:00Z,S3,us-east-1,0.010

  3. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-03.log
     2023-06-03T23:59:59Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.300

  4. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-04.log
     2023-06-04T00:00:01Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.050
     2023-06-04T12:00:00Z,BigQuery,us-central1,2.500

  5. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-05.log
     2023-06-05T08:15:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.400
     2023-06-05T10:00:00Z,EC2,us-east-2,0.080

  6. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-06.log
     2023-06-06T14:00:00Z,S3,us-east-1,0.015
     2023-06-06T18:45:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.250

  7. /home/user/cloud_costs/raw/2023-06-07.log
     2023-06-07T23:59:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.500
     2023-06-07T23:59:30Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.100

  ----------------------------------------------------------
  EXPECTED FILES THAT THE AGENT MUST CREATE
  ----------------------------------------------------------

  1. /home/user/cloud_costs/work/ec2_us-east-1_2023-06-01_to_2023-06-07.log  
     (exact lines, newline-terminated, in this order)

     2023-06-01T01:15:30Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.120
     2023-06-02T13:00:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.150
     2023-06-02T15:30:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.200
     2023-06-03T23:59:59Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.300
     2023-06-04T00:00:01Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.050
     2023-06-05T08:15:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.400
     2023-06-06T18:45:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.250
     2023-06-07T23:59:00Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.500
     2023-06-07T23:59:30Z,EC2,us-east-1,0.100

     → exactly nine lines, no header, no blank lines, LF line endings.

  2. /home/user/cloud_costs/reports/ec2_us-east-1_summary_2023-06-01_to_2023-06-07.txt  
     (single line, LF-terminated)

     Total EC2 us-east-1 cost for 2023-06-01 to 2023-06-07: $2.07

  ----------------------------------------------------------
  PERMISSIONS
  ----------------------------------------------------------
  Both of the above files must have mode 0644 (-rw-r--r--) so that the
  unprivileged grader process can read them.
